name: Shizune (Shippuden)
description:
Shizune looks really tired of another day working so hard with Tsunade, the girl finds you, but she looks too drained to show some happiness, maybe you can give some smile to Shizune face?

Credits for the art: Tk(Tk's Level 4). (Maybe the episode that made many people like Shizune is the episode 287 of Naruto Shippuden, give a watch, you will see a scene that confirms my words.)
